mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, category, creator_id, leader_last_active_at, leader_benefit_rate, current_members, min_members, max_members, balance, monthly_fee, deposit_amount, status, activated_at, is_verified, verified_at, is_public, thumbnail_url, banner_url, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, dissolution_reason FROM woorido.challenges WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE woorido.challenges SET balance = #{balance}, version = version + 1, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO woorido.challenges ( id, name, description, category, creator_id, leader_last_active_at, leader_benefit_rate, current_members, min_members, max_members, balance, monthly_fee, deposit_amount, status, is_verified, is_public, thumbnail_url, banner_url, version, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{category}, #{creatorId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{leaderBenefitRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{currentMembers}, #{minMembers}, #{maxMembers}, #{balance}, #{monthlyFee}, #{depositAmount}, #{status}, 'N', 'Y', #{thumbnailUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bannerUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.challenges WHERE LOWER(TRIM(name)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{name}))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.challenges WHERE LOWER(TRIM(name)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{name})) AND id != #{challengeId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.challenge_members cm JOIN woorido.challenges c ON cm.challenge_id = c.id WHERE cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.role = 'LEADER' AND cm.privilege_status != 'LEFT' AND c.status IN ('RECRUITING', 'IN_PROGRESS')

SELECT c.id AS challenge_id, c.name, c.description, c.category, c.status, c.current_members, c.max_members, c.monthly_fee AS support_amount, c.thumbnail_url AS thumbnail_image, c.banner_url AS banner_image, c.is_verified, c.created_at, u.id AS leader_user_id, u.nickname AS leader_nickname FROM woorido.challenges c LEFT JOIN woorido.users u ON c.creator_id = u.id WHERE c.is_public = 'Y'
AND c.status IN ('RECRUITING', 'IN_PROGRESS')
AND c.status IN ('COMPLETED', 'DISSOLVED')
AND c.status = #{status}
AND c.category = #{category}
ORDER BY
c.name c.current_members c.created_at
ASC DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT c.id AS challenge_id, c.name, c.description, c.category, c.status, c.current_members, c.max_members, c.monthly_fee AS support_amount, c.deposit_amount, c.balance, c.thumbnail_url AS thumbnail_image, c.banner_url AS banner_image, NULL AS rules, c.is_verified, c.activated_at AS started_at, c.created_at, u.id AS leader_id, u.nickname AS leader_nickname, NVL(us.total_score, 12) AS leader_brix FROM woorido.challenges c LEFT JOIN woorido.users u ON c.creator_id = u.id LEFT JOIN woorido.user_scores us ON u.id = us.user_id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE woorido.challenges SET name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, banner_url = #{bannerUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, max_members = #{maxMembers, jdbcType=INTEGER}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE woorido.challenges SET status = #{status}, deleted_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT c.id AS challenge_id, c.name, c.status, c.current_members, c.max_members, c.monthly_fee AS support_amount, c.thumbnail_url AS thumbnail_image, c.banner_url AS banner_image, cm.role AS my_role, cm.privilege_status AS my_status, cm.joined_at, cm.id AS member_id FROM woorido.challenge_members cm INNER JOIN woorido.challenges c ON cm.challenge_id = c.id WHERE cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.privilege_status != 'LEFT'
AND cm.role = #{role}
AND c.status IN ('RECRUITING', 'IN_PROGRESS')
AND c.status IN ('COMPLETED', 'DISSOLVED')
ORDER BY cm.joined_at DESC

SELECT c.id AS challenge_id, c.balance, c.deposit_amount AS locked_deposits, c.monthly_fee, c.current_members, (SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN le.type IN ('SUPPORT', 'ENTRY_FEE') THEN le.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM woorido.ledger_entries le WHERE le.challenge_id = c.id) AS total_income, (SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN le.type IN ('EXPENSE', 'REFUND') THEN le.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM woorido.ledger_entries le WHERE le.challenge_id = c.id) AS total_expense FROM woorido.challenges c WHERE c.id = #{challengeId}

SELECT transaction_id, amount, type, description, created_at FROM ( SELECT le.id AS transaction_id, le.amount, le.type, le.description, le.created_at FROM woorido.ledger_entries le WHERE le.challenge_id = #{challengeId} ORDER BY le.created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}
SELECT le.created_at, le.type, le.amount, le.balance_after FROM woorido.ledger_entries le WHERE le.challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND le.created_at >= #{startAt} ORDER BY le.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE woorido.challenges SET current_members = current_members + 1, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{challengeId} AND current_members < max_members
UPDATE woorido.challenges SET current_members = current_members - 1, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{challengeId} AND current_members > 0

UPDATE woorido.challenges c SET leader_last_active_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE c.id = #{challengeId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM woorido.challenge_members cm WHERE cm.challenge_id = c.id AND cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.role = 'LEADER' AND cm.privilege_status = 'ACTIVE' )
